name: Fashion Bel Air S.A.
summary: Fashion Bel Air S.A. provides fashion products for women in France. It offers pants, jeans, tops, T-shirts, dresses and combinations, skirts, shorts, accessories, coats, jackets, sweaters, vests, shirts, kimonos, jumpsuits, blouses, and sweats. The company provides its products through 12 boutiques and points of sales, as well as through its Website, Belair-Paris.fr. Fashion Bel Air S.A. is headquartered in Paris, France.
